metadata.description: Marketing plugins for Claude Code and Anthropic Cowork. All plugins ship zero global hooks and zero auto-connecting MCPs for clean multi-plugin coexistence; comply with the Anthropic Software Directory Policy; HTTP MCP connectors are Cowork-compatible. Every plugin (where applicable) ships a .mcp.json.connectors-reference catalog documenting Cowork-compatible aggregator paths (Pipedream, Composio, Zapier, Make.com) for services with no first-party HTTP MCP. Slash command syntax is canonical /<plugin-name>:<command> per Claude Code's auto-namespacing.

plugins.name: digital-marketing-pro
plugins.description: End-to-end digital marketing engagement methodology. **v3.3** modernizes for May 2026: privacy/compliance updates (EU AI Act Article 50 enforcement 2 Aug 2026, DPDP Phase II Nov 2026, NY synthetic-performer law June 2026, FTC May 2026 endorsement guidance, CCPA ADMT, CJEU pseudonymization ruling), channel mechanics (LinkedIn March 2026 algo + Depth Score, email DMARC + RFC 8058 + open-rate decline, TikTok USDS + AI creator labeling, WhatsApp per-message pricing, schema refresh with LLMs.txt, Sora deprecation note), AEO/GEO (Google AI Overviews + zero-click, Profound/Otterly/Conductor measurement). README restructured Quick Start-first with install + auto-update toggle as steps 1-2 and 'Where files go' section. v3.2 closes v3.1's hook-removal gaps with /digital-marketing-pro:check, /digital-marketing-pro:status, embedded hallucination checks, opt-in auto_save_insights flag. v3.0 introduced the 12-Part Strategy Flow producing the Four Core Documents (61 explicit steps), Two-Views Model, Decision Matrix, Update-Back Rule, Living Project Instruction File. 25 specialist agents, 149 skills, 70 Python scripts, 10 commands, 14 HTTP MCP connectors, 16 industry profiles, 16 privacy-law jurisdictions.

plugins.name: contentforge
plugins.description: Enterprise content production pipeline with 13 agents, 19 skills, and 16 opt-in HTTP MCP connectors. v3.9.5 splits Phase 6 internal linking into three categories — topical (informational), commercial (brand product/service pages), and conversion (audience-matched CTA) — with a new brand_pages schema, inline color-coded Word hyperlinks, Appendix D internal link map, and a stricter reviewer rubric (drops the 'no site structure = full credit' free-pass). v3.9.4 fixes pipeline orchestration to actually invoke subagents via Task tool and adds scripts/generate-docx.py for real Microsoft Word output with embedded SEO/Quality/Production appendices. v3.9 ships a 29-pattern AI-detection humanizer, self-critique meta-pass, and optional voice calibration.

plugins.name: socialforge
plugins.description: Agency-grade social media calendar automation with asset-first compositing, AI image generation (Vertex AI / Nano Banana Pro), and video generation (WaveSpeed / Kling v3.0 Pro). 25 commands, 15 skills, 5 agents, 19 scripts, 10 HTTP connectors. All AI-generated visuals require explicit user approval before use. v1.5 ships zero global hooks for clean multi-plugin coexistence — credential status now via /socialforge:status on demand. v1.5.1 hardened the plugin manifest. v1.5.2 fixed manifest install format. v1.5.3 swept all /sf: shorthand to /socialforge: across docs and runtime files for namespace consistency. All 10 connectors are HTTP — fully Cowork-compatible.
